# Pi Billboard

> AI-powered advertising network for stadiums and live venues worldwide, paid in Pi.

Pi Billboard lets advertisers generate stadium-ready creative with AI and deploy campaigns across a global network of live sports and entertainment venues, all settled in Pi cryptocurrency.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Global node network overview, AI Creative Engine, live venue inventory.
- [AI Creative Studio](/studio): Compose ad creatives with AI and preview them on real stadium billboard mockups.
- [Campaigns](/campaigns): Live and scheduled ad campaigns running on the network.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Network-wide impressions, spend, reach, and venue performance.
